sections.title: Fast shipping
sections.body: We process every order promptly. Standard shipping is free on this product. Estimated delivery between {start} and {end}.

sections.title: Order tracking
sections.body: You will receive an email with a tracking number as soon as your order leaves the warehouse. Check status in real time with the carrier.

sections.title: Estimated timelines
sections.body: Delivery times vary by location and carrier. Dates shown on the product page are estimates and are confirmed when your package ships.

sections.title: Withdrawal and claims
sections.body: Withdrawal without cause: 10 calendar days from delivery (Law 24.240). Claims for defect, damage, or error: up to 15 days with evidence. See our Returns Policy.

sections.title: Warranty
sections.body: All products include manufacturer warranty. If you notice a factory defect, contact us and we will help with a replacement or repair as applicable.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Free standard shipping typically takes between {start} and {end} depending on your location. We email you when your package is on its way.

faqs.question: Is there a warranty?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our products include manufacturer warranty. Contact us if you need post-purchase support.

faqs.question: How can I return the product?
faqs.answer: Withdrawal: 10 days from delivery via the Withdrawal button. Claims for defect or error: up to 15 days by emailing go.natural.555@gmail.com with photos and order number.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: When we ship your order you will receive an email with a tracking link from the carrier.

faqs.question: Can I pay in installments?
faqs.answer: At checkout you can pay with PayPal, which in many regions offers financing options depending on your account and country.

privacy.metaDescription: How Buenos Productos handles your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Buenos Productos, operated by Francisco Inza, respects your privacy. This policy explains what we collect, why, and your rights.

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: Controller: Francisco Inza (CUIT 20-40635753-9), operator of Buenos Productos.
Contact: go.natural.555@gmail.com

sections.title: Data we collect
bullets: Account and order data: name, email, shipping address, phone if provided.
Payment data: processed by PayPal; we do not store full card numbers.
Communications: support, withdrawal requests, and claims.
Technical data: device, browser, pages visited, and cookies (see Cookie Policy).

sections.title: How we use data
bullets: Process orders, payments, shipping, and after-sales support.
Handle returns, withdrawal, and claims.
Send confirmations, tracking, and operational emails.
Newsletter and marketing only with explicit consent.
Security, fraud prevention, and legal compliance.

sections.title: Processors and transfers
paragraphs: We share data only with providers required to operate the service.
bullets: PayPal — payment processing.
Supabase — authentication, orders, and account data.
Brevo — transactional email and newsletter (with consent).
Hosting, analytics, and international logistics providers.

sections.title: Retention and security
paragraphs: We retain data as needed for the commercial relationship, claims, and tax/accounting obligations.
We apply reasonable security measures; no system is 100% infallible.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: You may request access, correction, update, or deletion by emailing go.natural.555@gmail.com.
You may object to consent-based uses and withdraw consent where applicable.

privacy.closing: We may update this policy; the current version will always be published here.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies for site functionality, preferences, and experience improvements.

sections.title: What cookies are
paragraphs: Small files stored on your device when you visit the site.

sections.title: Types we use
bullets: Essential: session, cart, security, and checkout.
Preferences: language and basic settings.
Analytics: aggregated site performance (if enabled).

sections.title: Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can block or delete cookies in your browser. Some features may become unavailable.
Questions: go.natural.555@gmail.com

cookies.closing: We will update this policy if our tools change.

terms.metaDescription: Purchase terms for Buenos Productos — commercial intermediary with international shipping to Argentina.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern use of Buenos Productos and purchases on the site. By buying, you accept these conditions and applicable law in Argentina.

sections.title: Seller identification
paragraphs: Buenos Productos is operated by Francisco Inza, CUIT 20-40635753-9, address Uruguay 61, Río Cuarto, Córdoba, Argentina.
Contact: go.natural.555@gmail.com

sections.title: Nature of service
paragraphs: We act as a commercial intermediary: we select products, manage your order, and coordinate shipping through international suppliers and logistics operators.
The purchase contract is between you and Francisco Inza. Fulfillment may use third parties without reducing your rights against the site operator.

sections.title: Products and information
bullets: Products may be imported and supplied by international providers.
Images, dimensions, and colors are indicative; minor packaging or shade variations may occur.
Certifications listed come from the manufacturer or supplier.
Third-party brands belong to their owners; used descriptively only.

sections.title: Pricing and payment
bullets: Prices are shown in USD unless stated otherwise.
Payment is processed via PayPal or other methods enabled at checkout.
An order is confirmed when payment completes and you receive email confirmation.

sections.title: Shipping
paragraphs: Delivery times are estimates (typically 13–37 days from purchase, depending on location and logistics).
Customs, holidays, or force majeure may cause delays. See Shipping Policy.

sections.title: Returns and withdrawal
paragraphs: Two separate tracks apply by reason. See Returns Policy and Right of Withdrawal.
bullets: Withdrawal (no cause): 10 calendar days from delivery — non-waivable right in Argentina.
Claims for defect, damage, error, or non-delivery: up to 15 days from delivery with evidence.
After those windows, only legal conformity warranties may apply.

sections.title: Site use
paragraphs: Use the site lawfully. We may suspend features for maintenance, security, or fraud.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages to the extent permitted by law.
Nothing here limits non-waivable consumer rights in Argentina.

sections.title: Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Argentina. Disputes should first be resolved amicably.

terms.closing: We may update these terms; the version published at purchase applies unless law requires otherwise.

returns.metaDescription: Returns, withdrawal, and refunds at Buenos Productos.
returns.title: Returns & Refunds Policy
returns.intro: We separate legal withdrawal from product-issue claims. This keeps Argentine compliance clear and manageable.

sections.title: Track 1 — Withdrawal (Law 24.240)
paragraphs: If you change your mind without a product defect, you have 10 calendar days from receipt to revoke acceptance without justification.
Use the Withdrawal button or email go.natural.555@gmail.com with your order number.
bullets: Product must be unused, complete, and in original packaging.
We will instruct how to make the item available for return in Argentina.
Return shipping for withdrawal is borne by the seller under Argentine law.
We refund the amount paid within 10 days after receiving and verifying the product via the same payment method (PayPal).

sections.title: Track 2 — Product issue (defect, damage, error, not as described)
paragraphs: If the product arrived defective, damaged, incorrect, or not as described, contact us within 15 days of delivery.
bullets: Send photos of the product, packaging, and shipping label.
We will offer replacement, reshipment, or full refund as appropriate.
Return costs are on us when applicable.
Does not include change of mind after the withdrawal window.

sections.title: Non-delivery
paragraphs: If the package did not arrive within the published estimate, contact us with your order number. We will investigate and refund in full if non-delivery is confirmed.

sections.title: Exclusions
bullets: Custom or made-to-order products.
Sealed hygiene items that were opened.
Products damaged by misuse or modified by the customer.
Requests outside stated windows, except legal conformity warranty.

sections.title: How to start
bullets: Withdrawal: Withdrawal button on site.
Claims: go.natural.555@gmail.com with subject «Claim order [number]».
We respond within a reasonable time (typically 48 business hours).

returns.closing: Contact us before opening a PayPal chargeback; we can often resolve faster.

shipping.metaDescription: International shipping to Argentina — timelines, tracking, and customs.
shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.intro: Products ship from international suppliers to Argentina. Timelines are estimates and may vary due to logistics and customs.

sections.title: Coverage
paragraphs: We ship to addresses within Argentina. Verify postal code and details at checkout.

sections.title: Estimated timelines
paragraphs: Typical delivery window is 13–37 days from order confirmation, depending on location and carrier.
Dates on product pages are calculated dynamically and are indicative, not a guaranteed exact day.

sections.title: Shipping cost
paragraphs: Many products include free standard shipping as shown on the listing. Otherwise cost is displayed before payment.

sections.title: Processing and tracking
bullets: We process orders once payment is confirmed.
You will receive tracking by email when the package ships.
Tracking may update slowly during international legs.

sections.title: Customs and import
paragraphs: International shipments may be subject to customs inspection. Delays, holds, or documentation requests may extend delivery.
Cooperate with Correo Argentino or the carrier if contacted. Extraordinary customs costs, when required by regulation, may be the recipient's responsibility.

sections.title: Wrong address or refusal
paragraphs: If a package returns due to incorrect data or refusal at destination, we may arrange reshipment at extra cost or partial refund depending on the case.

shipping.closing: Shipping questions: go.natural.555@gmail.com with your order number.

regret.metaDescription: Exercise your right of withdrawal on distance sales — Argentina Law 24.240.
regret.title: Right of Withdrawal
regret.intro: Under Argentine Consumer Defense Law 24.240 and Resolution 424/2020, you may revoke your purchase within 10 calendar days of receiving the product, without justification.

sections.title: Conditions
bullets: Window: 10 calendar days from product delivery.
Product must be unused, complete, and in original packaging.
No site registration required to use this form.
We will send a case identification code within 24 hours.

sections.title: What happens next
paragraphs: We will instruct how to return the product to an address in Argentina.
Once the item is verified, we refund the PayPal payment within legal timeframes.

sections.title: Alternative contact
paragraphs: You may also email go.natural.555@gmail.com with subject «Withdrawal» and your order number.

regret.closing: This right is non-waivable and does not apply to legally excluded products (custom items, opened hygiene goods, etc.).

disclaimer.metaDescription: Liability limits and site information for Buenos Productos.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: This disclaimer complements our Terms and clarifies limits of information published on Buenos Productos.

sections.title: Site information
paragraphs: Content is informational and commercial. It does not replace professional, technical, or safety advice for your specific case.

sections.title: Imported products
bullets: International origin; timelines and availability may change.
Images and specs are indicative.
Certifications (CE, FCC, etc.) depend on manufacturer and batch.
We are not official representatives of third-party brands unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: Safe use
paragraphs: Use each product per its manual and electrical, thermal, or battery precautions. We are not liable for misuse.

sections.title: Reviews and third-party content
paragraphs: Some reviews may come from international marketplaces for reference. External links do not imply endorsement.

sections.title: Limitation
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law, Buenos Productos is not liable for indirect damages from site or product use.
Your consumer rights in Argentina remain intact.

aboutPage.metaTitle: About Go Natural | Our Story and Values
aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn the story of Go Natural. We design functional gear for a simpler, active, real life. Outdoor and lifestyle without excess.
aboutPage.heroTitle: We design products for a simpler, active, real life
aboutPage.heroText: Go Natural was born from the need for functional, well‑designed, accessible gear for people who live in motion. No complications, no excess, only what truly works.
storyParagraphs: Go Natural was born from the frustration of finding outdoor products that either cost too much or don’t deliver on what they promise. We got tired of paying for brands that sell style over function, and cheap products that break on first use.
We believe gear for adventure and active life should be accessible, durable, and honest. You don’t need the latest technology for a weekend hike, nor to pay double for a logo.

We select every product with real use in mind: backpacks that handle wear, clothing that washes and wears easily, accessories that actually improve your time outdoors. If we wouldn’t use it ourselves, we don’t sell it.
aboutPage.philosophyTitle: What we sell (and what we don’t)
philosophyYesItems: Products tested in real use, not only in a lab
Gear that prioritizes function over aesthetics
Fair prices without excessive margins or fake discounts
Materials that last: we don’t sell fast fashion disguised as outdoor
Clean design that doesn’t look obsolete after two seasons
philosophyNoItems: Products with unnecessary features that inflate the price
Ultra‑specialized gear you only use once a year
Promises of “revolutionary technology” that change nothing
Products that require complex maintenance or special care
aboutPage.philosophyClosing: Our criterion is simple: if it doesn’t improve your experience in a tangible way, it doesn’t belong here. We prefer a small, curated catalog over hundreds of products that don’t deliver.

values.title: Real functionality
values.text: Each product should solve a concrete problem. We don’t add features for marketing, only what you actually need to use.

values.title: Design without excess
values.text: Clean aesthetics that don’t go out of style. We prefer timeless design that works in the mountains and in the city.

values.title: Honest quality
values.text: We don’t promise infinite durability, but we do make products that handle real use. If something fails, we acknowledge it and improve it.

values.title: Everyday use
values.text: We design for people who move, not for display. Our products look good when used because they are made to be used.

trust.title: Shipping
trust.text: We work with reliable shipping services. Delivery times depend on your location and the postal service. We don’t promise express delivery we can’t meet, but we are transparent about when you’ll receive your order.

trust.title: Customer support
trust.text: We answer emails in under 48 hours. We don’t have a 24/7 call center, but we do have real people who know our products and can help you choose what you need.

trust.title: Returns
trust.text: If a product doesn’t meet your expectations, you can return it in good condition within the first 30 days. No uncomfortable questions, we just want you to be satisfied with your purchase.

trust.title: Checkout process
trust.text: Buying at Go Natural is simple: choose the product, pay securely, and receive your order. No hidden subscriptions, no surprise extra costs, no complications.

aboutPage.ctaText: Discover functional gear designed for real use, without excess or complications.

blog.title:
Journal
Move with intention
blog.subtitle: Stories about exploration, gear, and quiet journeys.
blog.intro: Thoughts, stories, and insights for those who move with intention.

journal.manifesto: Nature isn’t scenery. It’s where breath, rhythm, and belonging come back online.
journal.communityBody: Stories, meetups, and quiet decisions. A home for people who choose open air over endless scrolling.

fieldGear.title: Field Gear Used
fieldGear.caption: Selected for calm, reliable use in real conditions.

outdoor-facil.title: Going out without overthinking
outdoor-facil.seoTitle: Easy outdoor: trekking, camping, fishing and snorkel for everyone
outdoor-facil.description: Simple outdoor ideas: easy trekking, weekend camping, recreational fishing and snorkel for all levels.
manifesto: Going outdoors should not feel like a test.
Not everyone wants to push themselves every time they go out.
Sometimes it is enough to walk for a while, set a simple tent, or cast a line into the water.
You do not need experience, expensive gear, or to know everything.
This section is for that:
quiet outings, simple plans, and activities that fit real life.
Because being outside can also be easy.

outdoor-intermedio.title: A bit further
outdoor-intermedio.seoTitle: Intermediate outdoor activities: ski, snowboard, trekking and camping
outdoor-intermedio.description: Outdoor activities for going a bit further: resort ski, long trekking, camping and intermediate sports.
manifesto: When you have gone out a few times, the questions start to change.
How many days. What weather. What to bring.
Here we do not talk about extremes, but about planning.
Activities that require a bit more time, energy, and attention.
Ski, longer trekking, camping for several days.
Nothing impossible, but not improvised either.
This section is for those who want to move one step further without going to the limit.

outdoor-extremo.title: Going serious
outdoor-extremo.seoTitle: Extreme outdoor sports: off‑piste, climbing and advanced diving
outdoor-extremo.description: Content about extreme outdoor activities: off‑piste, climbing, advanced diving and expeditions, with a realistic and responsible approach.
manifesto: There are activities where mistakes carry weight.
Where experience matters and respect for the environment is essential.
Off‑piste, climbing, advanced diving.
They are not games, and they should not be presented as such.
This section does not glorify risk.
It speaks about preparation, decisions, and limits.
Because going serious also means knowing when not to go.

orderSuccessPage.subheadline: We're preparing your order with the care it deserves.
orderSuccessPage.emailLine: We've sent a confirmation email with the details of your order.
orderSuccessPage.emailLineCoordinatingWhatsapp: We'll coordinate payment on WhatsApp. If you didn't send the message, you can still reach us with your order number.
orderSuccessPage.noOrderTitle: We couldn't load this order yet
orderSuccessPage.noOrderHint: If you just completed checkout, details may take a moment to appear.

orderSuccessPage.brandQuote: Every piece of gear you chose is made to go where it matters.
orderSuccessPage.recommendBody: Explore more gear whenever you're planning the next outing.

orderSuccessPage.tiktokAria: Go Natural on TikTok (opens in a new tab)
orderSuccessPage.blogCarouselSubtitle: Short reads for your next trip — same stories as on the home page.
